children.name: div
children.textContent: Jordan still has it. Send a friendly nudge?

children.name: div
children.textContent: Alex returned the drill early. Your score just went up.

children.textContent: Get 3 items back this week to earn a community bonus.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Remind Alex K. to return before Saturday noon.

children.name: div
children.textContent: Your group has logged 50 loans together.
